series_metadata.series_description: 1) Records of fees received from permits issued. 2) Rotary 615 - records of receipt and deposit of fines for violation of Chapter 1509 ORC. 3) Rotary 604 - record of receipt and deposit of fees for Oil and Gas records, such as Xerox copies and microfilming copying. 4) Records of receipt and deposits of cash and negotiable Certificates of Deposit received in leiu of bonds as provided for in Section 1509.07 ORC.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Then retain two years, destroy upon discretion of Chief at the end of calendar year. ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Then retain two years, destroy upon discretion of Chief at the end of calendar year. Paper records may be destroyed upon scanning to an electronic format., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
